title: SkillSpector gate
commands_run: moon run archon:validate (negative test with a violating profile -> FAIL, then removed)
outcome: SkillSpector promoted from convention to an enforced gate. Profiles now carry [skills] loads_external (workspace-dev + agent-safe-maintenance = true, docs-only = false). archon-validate _validate_profiles gained the gate: any profile with skills.loads_external = true MUST list skillspector_scan in required_validators or validation FAILS. profile.schema.json documents the [skills] table and the gate; archon_profile_record adds loads_external_skills to the registry record. docs/agent-rails.md rewrote the skill-security section as 'the SkillSpector gate': a skill is not loaded until scanned, an unscanned skill is an unreviewed dependency, archon validate enforces the loads_external<->skillspector_scan pairing, and scans cache in the skill registry (the E06 prerequisite). profiles/README.md field table + contract example document the new flag. This closes E05 (S1-S4; S5 app-integration pattern + S6 POC tasks folded into S1-S4).
validation: moon run archon:validate PASS — 3 descriptors + 2 policies + 3 profiles + graph (17 nodes, 14 edges). Positive: docs-only (loads_external=false) validates without skillspector_scan; workspace-dev + agent-safe-maintenance (loads_external=true) carry skillspector_scan and validate. NEGATIVE TEST: a throwaway profile with loads_external=true and required_validators=[frontmatter] (no skillspector_scan) made archon validate FAIL with 'loads_external skills but required_validators is missing skillspector_scan (SkillSpector gate)'; fixture removed and validate returns PASS. registry profiles.json carries loads_external_skills per profile.
decisions: Gate made machine-enforceable via an explicit [skills] loads_external flag rather than inferring skill-loading from command lists — archon validate fails the pairing violation, so the gate is structural not advisory
docs-only sets loads_external=false (loads no skills) so it is correctly exempt from the skillspector_scan requirement
Scan-result caching + per-skill risks fields are deferred to E06 (skills module); E05 lands the profile-side gate and the doc that an unscanned skill does not load
skillspector_scan stays a named validator in the known-validator vocabulary so E06's skills.json can reference the same gate id
next: E06.S1 — skill registry (.agents/skills/ schema + skills.json generation; consumes the profile skillspector_scan gate)
token_note: Trust prerequisite, not a direct token lever: enabling on-demand skill loading (E06) safely. The gate lives in profile data (one flag) + one validate rule, so it costs no per-session prose. E05 complete: shared profile + lean AGENTS.md + RTK-per-profile + SkillSpector gate replace per-app prose sprawl.
